languages.text: "Кодировка... кажется знакомой. Думаю, это одна из вариаций шифровок {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g}. У каждого полка они свои, конечно же, но общий принцип схож... похоже на призыв о помощи".

traits.locale_text: "Кодировка... кажется знакомой. Думаю, это одна из вариаций шифровок {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g}. У каждого полка они свои, конечно же, но общий принцип схож... похоже на призыв о помощи".
traits.speaker: JaeCompanion

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]"Я узнаю кодировку, шерин! Это что-то вроде просьбы о помощи от подразделения {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g}. Порой корабли {g|Encyclopedia:ColdTrade}Хладного торга{/g} ловят подобные частоты..."

languages.text: "This code... it looks familiar. I think this might a variant of {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} encoding. Each regiment maintains its own, of course, but the underlying principles are similar. It appears to be a distress call."
languages.original_text: "Кодировка... кажется знакомой. Думаю, это одна из вариаций шифровок {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Астра Милитарум{/g}. У каждого полка они свои, конечно же, но общий принцип схож... похоже на призыв о помощи".

traits.locale_text: "The cipher... it seems familiar. I believe this to be one of the variants of {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} encoding. Each regiment maintains its own, of course, but the underlying principles are similar. It appears to be a distress call."

"This code... it looks familiar. I think this might a variant of {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} encoding. Each regiment maintains its own, of course, but the underlying principles are similar. It appears to be a distress call."

languages.text: «Este código... me resulta familiar. Parece una variante de código del {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. Cada regimiento tiene la suya propia, por supuesto, pero los principios básicos son iguales. Parece una llamada de auxilio».
languages.original_text: "This code... it looks familiar. I believe this to be a variant of {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} encoding. Each regiment maintains its own, of course, but the underlying principles are similar. It appears to be a distress call."

traits.locale_text: «Este código... me resulta familiar. Parece una variante de código del {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. Cada regimiento tiene la suya propia, por supuesto, pero los principios básicos son iguales. Parece una llamada de auxilio».

languages.text: “这代码……看着眼熟。我想这是{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}星界军{/g}军用代码的一种变体。当然，每个团都有自己的代码，但底层原理都差不多。看起来，这是一则求救信号。”
languages.original_text: "This code... it looks familiar. I believe this to be a variant of {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} encoding. Each regiment maintains its own, of course, but the underlying principles are similar. It appears to be a distress call."

traits.locale_text: “这代码……看着眼熟。我想这是{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}星界军{/g}军用代码的一种变体。当然，每个团都有自己的代码，但底层原理都差不多。看起来，这是一则求救信号。”

languages.text: « Ce code... il m'est familier. On dirait une variante du chiffrement de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. Chaque régiment dispose de son propre code, bien sûr, mais les principes sous-jacents demeurent similaires. Il semble s'agir d'un appel de détresse. »
languages.original_text: "This code... it looks familiar. I believe this to be a variant of {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} encoding. Each regiment maintains its own, of course, but the underlying principles are similar. It appears to be a distress call."

traits.locale_text: « Ce code... il m'est familier. On dirait une variante du chiffrement de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. Chaque régiment dispose de son propre code, bien sûr, mais les principes sous-jacents demeurent similaires. Il semble s'agir d'un appel de détresse. »

languages.text: "Bu... Tanıdık geliyor. Bunun {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} şifrelemesinin bir varyantı olduğuna inanıyorum. Elbette her alay kendi şifrelemesini sürdürür ancak temel prensipleri benzerdir. Bu bir tehlike çağrısına benziyor."
languages.original_text: "This code... it looks familiar. I believe this to be a variant of {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} encoding. Each regiment maintains its own, of course, but the underlying principles are similar. It appears to be a distress call."

traits.locale_text: "Bu... Tanıdık geliyor. Bunun {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} şifrelemesinin bir varyantı olduğuna inanıyorum. Elbette her alay kendi şifrelemesini sürdürür ancak temel prensipleri benzerdir. Bu bir tehlike çağrısına benziyor."

languages.text: "Dieser Code ... kommt mir bekannt vor. Ich glaube, das ist eine Codierungsvariante des {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. Jedes Regiment hat natürlich seinen eigenen Code, aber die Prinzipien sind ähnlich. Das scheint ein Notruf zu sein."
languages.original_text: "This code... it looks familiar. I believe this to be a variant of {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} encoding. Each regiment maintains its own, of course, but the underlying principles are similar. It appears to be a distress call."

traits.locale_text: "Dieser Code ... kommt mir bekannt vor. Ich glaube, das ist eine Codierungsvariante des {g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g}. Jedes Regiment hat natürlich seinen eigenen Code, aber die Prinzipien sind ähnlich. Das scheint ein Notruf zu sein."

languages.text: 「このコード...見覚えがある。これは{g|Encyclopedia:AstraMilitarumGlossary}Astra Militarum{/g} の変種だと思う。もちろん、各連隊は独自のものを維持しているが、根本的な原理は似ている。救難信号のようだ
